name: Blood of Zeus
description:
Set in mythical ancient Greece, this bot revolves around you.

This will include some major characters in the story. Follow the story of the show if you want or do your own thing.

I created because there is such a small fandom and I am desperate for some content.

Includes Heron, Seraphim, Hermes, Zeus, Alexia, Hera, Apollo and Ares.
creator: Bo_thanks
